privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic budget and actuals data explicitly modeled on NAICS 54 (Professional, Scientific, and Technical Services), which contradicts the metadata claim of 'Administrative and Support and Waste Management and Remediation Services'. Code execution analyzing the source CSV data confirms it contains exactly 8 unique cost centers, 28 total expense line items, and 12 month columns. The task instructions and verification script align accurately, requiring the creation of 'Monthly_Variance', 'YTD_Summary', and 'Executive_Summary' sheets while using specific features like advanced formulas (LARGE, SMALL, INDEX-MATCH), conditional formatting, and clustered bar/line trend charts.
